lenses_applied: Lens 1: Semantic fidelity (JP→ZH, JP→EN meaning preservation)
Lens 2: Technical accuracy (programming concepts for IT Passport curriculum)

findings.description: Section title uses JP kanji 択(U+629E) and 処(U+51E6) in Simplified Chinese text. Should use SC 择(U+62E9) and 处(U+5904). Affected string: '编程② 选択処理与循环处理' → should be '编程② 选择处理与循环处理'.
findings.jp_ref: プログラミング② 選択処理と繰返し処理

findings.description: Definition body uses '选択処理' (JP kanji) twice. Should be '选择处理' (SC). String contains 择(U+629E) and 処(U+51E6).
Figure caption '使用else（否则）的选択処理示意图' uses JP kanji 択処 instead of SC 择处.
Section title '编程② 选択処理与循环处理' uses JP kanji 択処. Same defect pattern as D-C34-001.
Function definition explanation uses '选択処理与循环处理' (JP kanji 択処) in the back-reference to earlier content. Should be '选择处理与循环处理'.

Section 09-08 EN title on p359 uses '2' (Arabic numeral): 'Programming 2: Selection and Iteration'. Pages 352 and 353 consistently use '②' (circled numeral). Should be 'Programming ②: Selection and Iteration'.

Caption uses 'loop processing' for 繰返し処理 but the established EN term in this chunk is 'Iteration Processing' (p352 table row). 'Contents of loop processing (while)' vs 'Iteration Processing'. Low impact but inconsistent.
p352 section title uses fullwidth space U+3000 between '②' and '選択処理', while p353 and p359 use regular space U+0020. Cosmetic only.

summary: Chunk 34 (pages 352-361, sections 09-08 and 09-09) contains 5 MAJOR defects and 3 MINOR defects across 73 leaves. The dominant defect pattern is CJK kanji contamination: Japanese kanji variants 択(U+629E) and 処(U+51E6) appear in Simplified Chinese text fields instead of the correct SC forms 择(U+62E9) and 处(U+5904). This recurring '选択処理' error affects section titles (p353, p359), a term definition body (p354), a figure caption (p354), and a cross-reference in a function definition (p361) — 5 entity-fields total, all MAJOR. Three MINOR issues: p359 EN section title uses Arabic '2' instead of circled '②'; p357 table caption uses 'loop processing' while the established EN term is 'Iteration Processing'; p352 section title uses fullwidth space vs regular space on other pages. No CRITICAL (semantic meaning errors) found. Technical accuracy of all programming concepts (sequential/selection/iteration processing, while/do/for loops, function definition/call) is correct in all three languages. Code literal strings (みなさん/こんにちは in program examples) correctly remain in Japanese as they represent program output, not translation errors.
